name: L-6 aggregator --resolve-consortia expands consortium reviewer affiliation cache to member_orgs for org-count semantics
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/pr-corpus/affiliation-cache && printf '%s' '{"member_orgs":["jpmorgan","stripe","capitalone"]}' > .claude-tdd-pro/pr-corpus/affiliation-cache/finos.json && printf '%s' '{"pattern_id":"q","supporting_prs":[{"reviewer":"finos","tier":1},{"reviewer":"finos","tier":1},{"reviewer":"finos","tier":1}]}' > p.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/pr-corpus/aggregate-evidence.sh" --pattern p.json --resolve-consortia --emit-fields 2>err.txt && grep -q '"organizations_count":3' err.txt && echo expanded 1>&2
